rationale: Career is entirely non-technical marketing and operations roles at IT services firms (TCS, Wipro) with one stint at fictional Stark Industries, and no ML, IR, or engineering experience whatsoever.

Entirely non-technical 12-year career spanning operations, customer support, content writing, and HR roles at IT services and manufacturing companies with no ML or engineering work.

Career is entirely non-technical project management, accounting, and operations roles including at Pied Piper (fictional company), with no ML, IR, or engineering production experience despite listing Data Science as a skill.
